arts.ttl: PSG to Incorporate Jordan Logo Into Crest?
arts.sum: According to our reliable source, PSG intends to incorporate the Jordan logo into the PSG crest for the fourth 25-26 collection.

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 27: Monaco face Nice as PSG could wrap up title
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 27 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…

arts.ttl: Achraf Hakimi and Lee Kang-in to miss PSG’s visit to Saint-Étienne
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have revealed that Achraf Hakimi (26) will not make the trip to the Stade Geoffrey-Guichard to face AS Saint-Étienne on Saturday evening. The club announced that its sports…

Without a win in nine Ligue 1 matches, Saint-Etienne welcome unbeaten league leaders PSG on Saturday evening. The hosts have not picked up three points since a 3-1 home win over Reims at the beginnin...

arts.ttl: Man City could use 'Claudio Echeverri card' to beat Real Madrid, PSG to £41.6m transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City could use teenage midfield talent Claudio Echeverri as a bargaining chip in their pursuit of Lazio defender Mario Gila, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s Massive Offer Nearly Swayed PSG Superstar After Inter Milan Departure In 2021
arts.sum: Achraf Hakimi has established himself as a leader at Paris Saint-Germain this season, sometimes even wearing the captain’s armband. Nonetheless, if it were up to his entourage, this entire scenario might not have happened. arts.ttl: Barcelona Willing to Offer Liverpool Veteran Two-Year Contract Amid PSG Links
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have focused on signing young, up-and-coming talent in recent transfer windows, but both Luis Enrique and Luis Campos understand the importance of experience—as long as it aligns with the club’s culture and playing style. arts.ttl: Real Madrid View €18M-Rated AC Milan Standout as Plan B to Liverpool, PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain had its eye on Dean Huijsen last summer as part of a defensive overhaul, but the Spanish center-back ended up joining AFC Bournemouth instead. If PSG revisits its interest, it won’t be alone in the race. arts.ttl: Man United Racing to Edge Liverpool for £67M-Rated Standout With PSG Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will keep a close eye on Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, as they’re set to receive a percentage of the transfer fee. According to a previous report from CaughtOffside, Newcastle is considering Ekitike as a possible replacement for Alexander Isak. arts.ttl: Saudi Arabia Continues Strong Interest in Man Utd Ace, Paving Way for €30M-rated PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are facing uncertainty in goal, with Gianluigi Donnarumma’s future up in the air. If the club decides to part ways with the 26-year-old, they’ll need to find a replacement in the transfer market. Donnarumma’s contract runs through 2026, but past mistakes have raised concerns, prompting PSG to look for long-term options.
